action.reasoning: Observation: CNN+PPO with FullyObsWrapper got 0% on 9/10 environments (only DistShift1 at 100%). Analysis: The core problem is sparse rewards - PPO can't discover reward signals in complex sequential tasks (keys, doors, etc.). Two key issues: (1) observation values are tiny after /255 normalization (object indices 0-10 become 0-0.04), causing vanishing gradients, and (2) no exploration bonus for sparse rewards. Decision: (1) Use one-hot encoding for (OBJECT,COLOR,STATE) channels → 22 binary channels with proper 0/1 values, (2) Add count-based intrinsic reward using agent (x,y,dir,carrying) state to encourage exploration, (3) Increase entropy coefficient to 0.2, (4) Train 1M timesteps per env since intrinsic reward should enable learning. This addresses both the representation issue and the exploration issue.
